name_en: 🆕 M82348 Pink New Women's Tri-fold Wallet. The Victorine wallet is presented in Monogram Empreinte soft-grain leather with a classic Monogram embossing, appearing more refined in a two-tone effect. The compact structure easily accommodates bills, coins, and cards.
name_cn:
🆕 M82348 Pink New Women's Tri-fold Wallet. The Victorine wallet is presented in Monogram Empreinte soft-grain leather with a classic Monogram embossing, appearing more refined in a two-tone effect. The compact structure easily accommodates bills, coins, and cards.
Detailed Features
12 x 9.5 x 1.5 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Soft-grain calfskin leather
Calfskin lining
Metalware
Push-button closure
Bill compartment
Zip coin pocket
Patch pocket
Card slots
